message.content:
@startuml
title PB-351 UC23 – View Offers Details on System Management

note over UI, NextPlatform #white
**Abstract:**
This use case will retrieve details of a specific Offer. This endpoint already
exists on the Partners and Offers platform, but we have to add on response
the new fields.
end note

box "Partners and Offers Platform" #LightGray
participant "Next Platform" as NextPlatform
database "Next Database" as NextDatabase
end box

actor "UI (System Admin and Manager – System Management)" as UI

UI -> NextPlatform : **1** **HTTP**\nGET /offers/{offerId}

note over NextPlatform #orange
**Note to developers**
Add these fields on response:
1. . benefit
2. . listImage
3. . listImageVersion
4. . partnerName

Also, change the type of:
5. . startDate
6. . endDate
To consider timestamp from now on.
end note

note over NextPlatform #violet
For partnerName consider the field 'FANTASY_NAME' in PATNER table.
end note

NextPlatform -> UI : **2** response

@enduml
